testcase.name: Route Navigation - Critical Paths › should navigate to /dashboard and render page
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › /dashboard should have accessible main content area
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › should navigate to /sprint and render page
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › /sprint should have accessible main content area
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › should navigate to /story/new and render page
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › /story/new should have accessible main content area
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › should navigate to /agent and render page
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › /agent should have accessible main content area
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › should navigate to /docs and render page
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › /docs should have accessible main content area
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › should navigate to /vision and render page
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › /vision should have accessible main content area
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › should navigate to /cost and render page
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › /cost should have accessible main content area
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › should navigate to /learnings and render page
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › /learnings should have accessible main content area
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › should navigate to /crew/memories and render page
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › /crew/memories should have accessible main content area
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › should navigate to /crew/observations and render page
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › /crew/observations should have accessible main content area
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › should navigate to /observation-lounge and render page
Route Navigation - Critical Paths › /observation-lounge should have accessible main content area
Sidebar Persistence › sidebar collapse state persists across navigation
Sidebar Persistence › sidebar navigation items are clickable
Theme Switching › theme toggle switches between LCARS, dark, and light
Theme Switching › dark mode is visually distinct from light mode
VSCode Sync Integration › chat messages from VSCode appear in web UI
Error Handling › gracefully handles server unavailable
Error Handling › recovers when server comes back online
Role-Based Access › admin role sees all UI elements
Role-Based Access › user role sees only assigned items
Security Assertions › no credentials in page source
Security Assertions › no credentials in console logs
Security Assertions › requests include WorfGate headers
Performance Baselines › dashboard loads within 5 seconds
Performance Baselines › navigation between routes completes within 3 seconds
Accessibility Basics › page has proper heading hierarchy
Accessibility Basics › buttons and links are keyboard accessible
